'''chatodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylarate|xylarate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylarate|xylarate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chatodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chætedeth|chætedeth]] || [[word:chætedej|chætedej]] || [[word:chætedesh|chætedesh]] || [[word:chætede|chætede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chatotodoth|chatotodoth]] || [[word:chatotodoj|chatotodoj]] || [[word:chatotodosh|chatotodosh]] || [[word:chatotodo|chatotodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chatodoth|chatodoth]] || [[word:chatodoj|chatodoj]] || [[word:chatodosh|chatodosh]] || [[word:chatodo|chatodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chatofdoth|chatofdoth]] || [[word:chatofdoj|chatofdoj]] || [[word:chatofdosh|chatofdosh]] || [[word:chatofdof|chatofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chatodotho|chatodotho]] || [[word:chatodojo|chatodojo]] || [[word:chatodosho|chatodosho]] || [[word:chatodoko|chatodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chatodoth|chatodoth]] || [[word:chatodoj|chatodoj]] || [[word:chatodosh|chatodosh]] || [[word:chatodo|chatodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chatodothol|chatodothol]] || [[word:chatodojol|chatodojol]] || [[word:chatodoshol|chatodoshol]] || [[word:chatodokol|chatodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chatodothotho|chatodothotho]] || [[word:chatodojojo|chatodojojo]] || [[word:chatodoshosho|chatodoshosho]] || [[word:chatodoko|chatodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chatodothon|chatodothon]] || [[word:chatodojon|chatodojon]] || [[word:chatodoshon|chatodoshon]] || [[word:chatodokon|chatodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chatodothoro|chatodothoro]] || [[word:chatodojoro|chatodojoro]] || [[word:chatodoshoro|chatodoshoro]] || [[word:chatodokoro|chatodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
